_comment: Example REMOTE / TEAM configuration for the Chaos MCP server over Streamable HTTP.
For local Cursor use, prefer the desktop app's Integrations screen: it installs
the pinned server and manages the user-level ~/.cursor/mcp.json outside Git.
For a shared hosted server, copy this entry only into your user-level Cursor
configuration. Never commit a project-local .cursor/mcp.json containing a key.
Inject CHAOS_SCHEDULER_API_KEY into the host process from a secret manager,
then run the pinned server in HTTP mode:
Each Cursor client must pass its OWN scoped scheduler key via the Authorization
header; HTTP mode does not fall back to the host's configured stdio key.
